message:
feat(fusion,index): add synchronous two-tier search and in-memory index improvements

Introduce SyncTwoTierSearcher in frankensearch-fusion providing a fully
synchronous, iterator-based progressive search orchestration for low-latency
UI scenarios. The searcher operates on precomputed query embeddings and
in-memory indices, mirroring the async TwoTierSearcher's two-phase contract
(fast recall -> quality reranking) without requiring an async runtime:

- SyncTwoTierSearcher: Wraps an Arc<InMemoryTwoTierIndex> with optional
  SyncLexicalSearch backend for RRF hybrid fusion. Provides search_sync()
  returning full TwoTierMetrics, and into_iter() for progressive
  SyncSearchIterator consumption.
- SyncSearchIterator: Implements Iterator<Item = SearchPhase> yielding
  FastRecall and QualityRerank phases progressively, enabling callers to
  render partial results between phases.
- SyncLexicalSearch trait: Pluggable synchronous lexical retrieval interface
  for hybrid search scenarios.

Improve InMemoryVectorIndex with idiomatic Rust refinements:
- Convert from_vectors() to consume vectors by value (into_iter) instead of
  borrowing, eliminating unnecessary copies during index construction.
- Mark record_count(), dimension(), and InMemoryTwoTierIndex::new(),
  fast_index(), quality_index() as const fn where possible.
- Refactor scan_range() to use let-chains (if-let-and patterns) for the
  filter check and heap cutoff update, reducing nesting depth.
- Refactor insert_candidate() to use a single if-let-chain instead of
  nested if-let blocks.
- Add #[must_use] annotation to InMemoryTwoTierIndex::new().
- Add doc comment with # Errors section to scores_for_hits().
- Apply rustfmt cleanup to multi-line function signatures and test helpers.

Add from_fsvi_matches_file_backed_search test verifying that InMemoryVector
Index::from_fsvi() produces identical search results to the file-backed
VectorIndex for the same dataset.

Add comprehensive test suite in sync_searcher_tests.rs covering empty index,
single-phase fast-only search, two-phase quality rerank, lexical RRF fusion,
iterator progressive consumption, custom SearchParams propagation, and
metrics correctness.

Add in_memory_tests.rs with extended test coverage for the in-memory index
module.

Re-export InMemoryTwoTierIndex, InMemoryVectorIndex, SyncLexicalSearch,
SyncSearchIterator, and SyncTwoTierSearcher from both the
frankensearch-index and frankensearch crate root libs and prelude.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
